Journals

Published research articles and academic papers

Publications

Published Articles

Machine LearningJanuary 2026Sinta 3

Hybrid Machine Learning Predictive Model for Resource Allocation Optimization and Project Risk Management

Andika Noor Ismawan, Sawali Wahyu

IT project management faces critical challenges related to inaccurate resource allocation estimation and project risk assessment. This study proposes a hybrid machine learning-based decision support framework that integrates Gradient Boosting, Artificial Neural Networks, and Naive Bayes classifier to produce calibrated probabilistic predictions.

Sinkron - Politeknik Ganesha Medan Vol. 10 No. 1
Software EngineeringJuly 2025Sinta 5

Analisis Perbandingan Strategi Reuse Service dalam Implementasi Service-Oriented Architecture (SOA)

Andika Noor Ismawan, et al.

This study conducts a comparative analysis of four reuse service approaches within SOA framework: API & Service Standardization, Microservices Architecture, API-First Development, and Enterprise Service Bus (ESB).

JUTIN - Universitas Esa Unggul
Computer VisionFebruary 2026

Object Detection Menggunakan Model COCO-SSD di Web Browser

Hermansyah, Andika Noor Ismawan, Sahri Ramadan

This research proposes an object detection system using COCO-SSD model that can run in web browsers. The system achieves good accuracy (mAP 0.75) and high speed (30 FPS) without additional installation.

JRSIT - Universitas Esa Unggul

Research Focus

Areas of Interest

Machine Learning

Predictive modeling for project risk assessment and resource allocation optimization using hybrid ML approaches.

Software Architecture

Service-Oriented Architecture (SOA) and microservices for efficient IT project implementation.

Computer Vision

Object detection using deep learning models deployed in web browsers with TensorFlow.js.

AI Product Strategy

Integrating AI capabilities into product roadmaps and leveraging machine learning for enhanced user experiences and business outcomes.

Project Management

Agile methodologies, sprint planning, and cross-functional team leadership to deliver projects on time and within budget.

Product Discovery

User research, customer interviews, and market analysis to validate product ideas and ensure product-market fit.
